name: DW · Fact Inventory Snapshot
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS inventory_snapshot_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('INVPROD'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 200)    AS product_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('INVSTORE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 50)    AS store_id,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('INVDATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 90)::int) AS snapshot_date,
    (('x'||substr(md5('INVSOH'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 500) + 50     AS stock_on_hand,
    (('x'||substr(md5('INVROL'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 100) + 10     AS reorder_level,
    (('x'||substr(md5('INVTRANS'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 200)        AS units_in_transit,
    (ARRAY['Active','Active','Discontinued','Backordered'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('INVSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)] AS status
FROM generate_series(1, 4000) AS gs
